items.description: Light up the night with this dynamic bow and arrow set.  One hit does 22 damage, but charge the bow and you'll quadruple the damage.

items.name: Scarecrow on my Head
items.description: So I had this problem - birds kept landing on my head.  Then I put the scarecrow on my head. It solved my problems, but I miss the birds.
